Returns and rankings Annualised returns Absolute returns Name 1M 3M 6M All Fund returns +13.9% -0.4% -0.6% -0.4% Category average ( Equity Flexi Cap ) -- -- -- -- Rank ( Equity Flexi Cap ) -- 43 20 -- Understand terms Expense ratio A fee payable to a mutual fund house for managing your mutual fund investments. It is the total percentage of a company's fund assets used for administrative, management, advertising, and other expenses. Tax A percentage of your capital gains payable to the government upon exiting your mutual fund investments. Taxation is categorized as long-term capital gains (LTCG) and short-term capital gains (STCG) depending on your holding period and the type of fund. Exit load A fee payable to a mutual fund house for exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of investment. Stamp duty A form of tax payable for the purchase or sale of an asset or security. Exit Load 24 Sep 2025 Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 30 days. Exit load, stamp duty and tax Exit load Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 30 days. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%. Also manages these schemes The Wealth Company Flexi Cap Fund Direct Growth The Wealth Company Liquid Fund Direct Growth The Wealth Company Multi Asset Allocation Fund Direct Growth The Wealth Company Balanced Advantage Fund Direct Growth About The Wealth Company Flexi Cap Fund Direct Growth The Wealth Company Flexi Cap Fund Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by The Wealth Company Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 18 Jul 2025. Neeraj Jain is the Current Fund Manager of The Wealth Company Flexi Cap Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹1112 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 06 May 2026 is ₹10.12.

The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹1112 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 06 May 2026 is ₹10.12. The The Wealth Company Flexi Cap Fund Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹250. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹1000. Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 30 days. ; Investment Objective The scheme seeks to provide long-term growth in capital and income to investors, through active management of investments in a diversified portfolio of equity and equity-related securities across the entire market capitalization spectrum and in debt and money market instruments.
